'''gadugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabouter|kabouter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabouter|kabouter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gadugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædigith|gædigith]] || [[word:gædigij|gædigij]] || [[word:gædigish|gædigish]] || [[word:gædigi|gædigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gaduduguth|gaduduguth]] || [[word:gaduduguj|gaduduguj]] || [[word:gadudugush|gadudugush]] || [[word:gadudugu|gadudugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gaduguth|gaduguth]] || [[word:gaduguj|gaduguj]] || [[word:gadugush|gadugush]] || [[word:gadugu|gadugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadufguth|gadufguth]] || [[word:gadufguj|gadufguj]] || [[word:gadufgush|gadufgush]] || [[word:gadufguf|gadufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gaduguthu|gaduguthu]] || [[word:gaduguju|gaduguju]] || [[word:gadugushu|gadugushu]] || [[word:gaduguku|gaduguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gaduguth|gaduguth]] || [[word:gaduguj|gaduguj]] || [[word:gadugush|gadugush]] || [[word:gadugu|gadugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gaduguthul|gaduguthul]] || [[word:gadugujul|gadugujul]] || [[word:gadugushul|gadugushul]] || [[word:gadugukul|gadugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gaduguthuthu|gaduguthuthu]] || [[word:gadugujuju|gadugujuju]] || [[word:gadugushushu|gadugushushu]] || [[word:gaduguku|gaduguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gaduguthun|gaduguthun]] || [[word:gadugujun|gadugujun]] || [[word:gadugushun|gadugushun]] || [[word:gadugukun|gadugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gaduguthuoro|gaduguthuoro]] || [[word:gadugujuoro|gadugujuoro]] || [[word:gadugushuoro|gadugushuoro]] || [[word:gadugukuoro|gadugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
